channel.title: Agriculture on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in Agriculture on Nature Works

item.title: How to transform school meals? Beans is how!
item.description:
Very inspirational blog post about improving UK school meals. It is a lot of work but worth it

Hodmedod’s grow UK grain and pulses, and they are doing a lot of what I consider essential work in food security & sovereignty, soil preservation, education and health. http://localhost:1313/blog/240224-school-meals-beans/
